title: mentha riparia var. pilosa
intro: Mentha riparia var. pilosa, also known as American wild mint, is a variety of mint plant native to North America, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha riparia var. pilosa include relief from digestive problems, headaches, and fever, as well as its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of American wild mint can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, calm the mind, and promote overall well-being.
